ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lottery_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lottery category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the lottery category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lottery category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lottery_drawings" (
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lottery drawing */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the lottery category */,
  "drawing_date" TEXT /* Date of the lottery drawing */,
  "winning_numbers" TEXT /* Winning numbers for the drawing */,
  "euro_numbers" TEXT /* Euro numbers for the drawing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the drawing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the drawing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drawing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lottery_prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize match category */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the lottery drawing */,
  "numbers_matched" TEXT /* Description of the number matches required to win */,
  "prize_per_winner" REAL /* Amount awarded per winner for this match category */,
  "winners_from_italy" INTEGER /* Number of winners from Italy */,
  "prize_fund_amount" REAL /* Total prize fund amount allocated for this match category */,
  "total_winners" INTEGER /* Total number of winners for this match category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prize was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prize was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the prize match category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the winner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the winner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the winner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the winner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the winner was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the winner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the winner */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the payment (e.g. bank transfer, check) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g. pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g. prize distribution, winner list) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. administrator, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g. login, view report) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
